name: pack-smoke-compat
description: Clean-install smoke fixture: the @streetjs/core compat shim re-exports the freshly packed local streetjs build. CI copies the packed tarballs to ./streetjs.tgz and ./street-core-compat.tgz, then runs `npm ci` (pinned). The compat package pins streetjs to the exact version, which the local core tarball satisfies.
